_meta.source: Evgeny's outreach plan written to Andrey Kazarinov, May 2026 (translated from Russian)
_meta.instruction: These are the EXACT 23 asks Evgeny gave Andrey. Process these FIRST before falling back to contacts.json. Each item has a specific ask_type — DO NOT use the generic recommend template for all of them.

ask_types.send_cv: Just forward Evgeny's CV — no role-specific framing
ask_types.recommend_for_role: Refer Evgeny to specific job postings (job_urls field)
ask_types.recommend_generally: Recommend Evgeny for any relevant roles
ask_types.intro_to_founders: Request an intro / make an intro to founders or specific people
ask_types.post_in_chat: Post Evgeny's CV in a group chat
ask_types.ask_about_openings: Ask if there are openings in a specific area (e.g. digital transformation)

items.name: Veronika Nogovitsyna
items.ask_detail: Post Evgeny's CV in the UAE top managers chat she runs.
items.andrey_notes: Andrey knows her; she runs a UAE top managers chat where CVs get visibility.
items.custom_message:
Veronika, hello. How are you?
Sharing the profile of Evgeny Muravev — he helped us build Tabby's merchant lending and payments product, wallets for business in UAE. Exploring new product roles in payments / lending, Dubai based, open to relocation.

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/evgenymuravev
CV attached.

happy to make any intro — DM me directly.

— Andrey

items.name: Harry Silvester
items.company: Recruitment agency (he's leaving but agency continues)
items.ask_detail: Connect with him — he's leaving the agency but the agency continues to work. Also: any other recruiter who reaches out to Andrey, forward Evgeny.

items.name: Dr. Sebastian Walter
items.ask_detail: Ask if he has roles in digital transformation. If yes, refer Evgeny to these specific FAB job postings:

items.name: Sergey Terentyev
items.role: ex-CTO of WIO, now at INB
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny. The reference LinkedIn post identifies the person:
items.andrey_notes: Need to identify exact person from the LinkedIn activity post. Likely Serge T. (CTO & Head of Digital Bank at INB per our broader contacts.json).

items.name: Fernando Plaza
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny for any relevant product / digital transformation roles.

items.name: Ricardo Saad
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny.

items.name: Oleg Dylevich
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny.

items.name: Oliver Hughes
items.ask_detail: Write to him directly. Evgeny is ready to relocate to Uzbekistan and understands salary will not match UAE.
items.andrey_notes: Oliver Hughes is TBC Group CEO (parent). For Uzbekistan-specific reach: Nika Kurdiani is CEO of TBC Uzbekistan — https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikakurdiani/. Andrey should pick which one fits the ask better.
items.custom_message:
Oliver — would like to introduce you to Evgeny who is exploring open roles at TBC Bank in product. You have met a couple of times when you were visiting Tabby. Evgeny helped us build our merchant lending and payments product, wallets for business in UAE and I highly recommend him for any product role you may have in payments or lending. Ready to relocate.

his LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/evgenymuravev
happy to share his CV directly.

— Andrey

items.name: Dwelly founders
items.ask_detail: Andrey previously offered to intro Evgeny to the founder. Confirm and make the intro. Vlad recommended Dan highly.
items.andrey_notes: Real estate agency automation with AI — very aligned with Evgeny's interests.
items.custom_message:
Hi Dan, would like to introduce you to Evgeny who is exploring new product opportunities. Evgeny helped us build our merchant lending and payments product, wallets for business in UAE.
He has previous experience in automation and optimization of offline businesses in X5.

If you're open to a 20-min chat, I'll connect you both. His LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/evgenymuravev

— Andrey

items.name: Wise friend
items.ask_detail: Write to Andrey's friend at Wise. Exec search has also reached out. Relocation to London OK. Specifically interested in:
items.andrey_notes: Andrey to identify which friend — Evgeny didn't name him.

items.name: Airwallex hiring contact
items.ask_detail: Only one UAE role currently visible (URL below). Evgeny ready to relocate to Australia, US, or Asia where Airwallex has open product positions.
items.andrey_notes: Evgeny carefully studied the product. Andrey to find appropriate contact at Airwallex.

items.name: BCG contact 1
items.ask_detail: Andrey previously mentioned 2 BCG contacts. Intro Evgeny for a conversation: 'should I try the Dubai office now; can my profile be useful?'
items.andrey_notes: Andrey to identify which 2 BCG contacts he had in mind.

items.name: BCG contact 2
items.ask_detail: Same as BCG contact 1.

items.name: Eugene (Zhenya) Shilnikov
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny. No visible open positions. Evgeny is also writing to him directly.
items.andrey_notes: Ex-Yandex acquirer. Evgeny doing parallel outreach.

items.name: Michael Calvey
items.ask_detail: Write to him in case he reads. No lead positions visible per Evgeny's friend at Plata, but worth the shot.

items.name: David Isakhanian
items.ask_detail: Simply send Evgeny's CV.

items.name: Uzum CPO BNPL hiring contact
items.role: Hiring manager for CPO BNPL role
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny for the CPO BNPL role at Uzum.
items.andrey_notes: Andrey to identify the hiring contact.

items.name: Google hiring contact
items.ask_detail: Evgeny notes this is a 'side gig' role; happy to try if Andrey thinks the role is a viable entry point.

items.name: Marc Saade
items.ask_detail: Write so he has Evgeny in mind for future openings. Mortgages currently not doing well, so no immediate hiring.
items.andrey_notes: Andrey to identify the VP of Product.

items.name: Andrei Krugliak
items.ask_detail: No open positions found in region. Share context about what's happening with business in region; explore.
items.andrey_notes: Andrey has strong Yango network (10 contacts in our database). Andrey to pick best regional contact.

items.name: Karun Kurien
items.ask_detail: Recommend Evgeny.
items.andrey_notes: Evgeny notes Andrey is connected (1st degree). Ex-McKinsey.

items.name: Evgeniya Kazina
items.ask_detail: Send CV. No current positions but worth being on radar.

items.name: Sarkis Atanesov
items.ask_detail: Send CV. Connected on LinkedIn (1st degree).
